overview: Prime Wellness Clinic offers bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT), medically managed weight loss programs, and primary care services. The clinic combines in-person visits with telemedicine and home delivery options for BHRT.
highlights: Telemedicine and home delivery for BHRT
Medically managed weight loss program with personalized plans
targetAudience: Women experiencing hormonal imbalances such as menopause, perimenopause, thyroid issues, and PCOS.
